shell.subtitle: A fast, native-feeling PySide6 desktop toolkit with lazy plugin discovery, multilingual shell chrome, tray integration, and cached tool pages.
shell.note: Pages are created only when you open them. Modules stay unloaded until the matching tool is requested.
shell.welcome.title: Welcome
shell.welcome.description: Pick a tool from the left to load it into the workspace.
shell.placeholder.title: The app core is built for desktop use.
shell.placeholder.body: Themes, language switching, workflows, shortcuts, startup behavior, and tray integration all live directly inside Micro Toolkit.
tray.hidden.title: Running in tray
tray.hidden.body: Micro Toolkit is still running in the system tray.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Control appearance, language, startup behavior, tray behavior, and shortcuts from one place.
settings.output.label: Default output folder
settings.output.note: Tools export into this folder by default.
settings.theme.label: Theme
settings.language.label: Language
settings.scaling.label: UI scaling
settings.appearance.note: Theme and language changes apply immediately.
settings.startup.enabled: Autostart is enabled for this user profile.
settings.shortcuts.note: Application shortcuts are always available while the app is focused. Global shortcuts are optional and may depend on desktop permissions.
settings.saved.title: Settings saved
workflow.title: Workflows
workflow.description: Save reusable automation sequences built from registered app commands. Workflows can open tools, switch language, change theme, and trigger shell actions.
workflow.name: Name
workflow.warning.title: Missing name
workflow.warning.name: Enter a workflow name before saving or running it.
workflow.saved.title: Workflow saved
workflow.run_failed.title: Workflow failed
